en: A SHIGGAION OF DAVID, WHICH HE SANG TO THE LORD CONCERNING THE WORDS OF CUSH, A BENJAMINITE. O LORD my God, in you do I take refuge; save me from all my pursuers and deliver me,
zh: 耶和華我的 神啊！我已經投靠了你， 求你拯救我脫離所有追趕我的人。 求你搭救我，

en: lest like a lion they tear my soul apart, rending it in pieces, with none to deliver.
zh: 免得他們像獅子一般把我撕裂， 把我撕碎的時候，也沒有人搭救。

en: O LORD my God, if I have done this, if there is wrong in my hands,
zh: 耶和華我的 神啊！如果我作了這事， 如果我手中有罪孽，

en: if I have repaid my friend with evil or plundered my enemy without cause,
zh: 如果我以惡回報那與我為友的人， 或是無故掠奪與我為敵的人，

en: let the enemy pursue my soul and overtake it, and let him trample my life to the ground and lay my glory in the dust. Selah
zh: 就任憑仇敵追趕我，直到追上， 把我的性命踐踏在地上， 使我的光榮歸於塵土。

en: Arise, O LORD, in your anger; lift yourself up against the fury of my enemies; awake for me; you have appointed a judgment.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你在怒中起來， 求你挺身而起，抵擋我敵人的暴怒， 求你為我興起；你已經出令施行審判。

en: Let the assembly of the peoples be gathered about you; over it return on high.
zh: 願萬民聚集環繞你， 願你歸回高處，統管他們。

en: The LORD judges the peoples; judge me, O LORD, according to my righteousness and according to the integrity that is in me.
zh: 願耶和華審判萬民。 耶和華啊！求你按著我的公義， 照著我心中的正直判斷我。

en: Oh, let the evil of the wicked come to an end, and may you establish the righteous- you who test the minds and hearts, O righteous God!
zh: 願惡人的惡行止息， 願你使義人堅立。 公義的 神啊！ 你是察驗人心腸肺腑的。

en: My shield is with God, who saves the upright in heart.
zh: 神是我的盾牌， 他拯救心裡正直的人。

en: God is a righteous judge, and a God who feels indignation every day.
zh: 神是公義的審判者， 他是天天向惡人發怒的 神。

en: If a man does not repent, God will whet his sword; he has bent and readied his bow;
zh: 如果人不悔改， 神必把他的刀磨快。 神已經把弓拉開，準備妥當。

en: he has prepared for him his deadly weapons, making his arrows fiery shafts.
zh: 他親自預備了致命的武器， 他使所射的箭成為燃燒的箭。

en: Behold, the wicked man conceives evil and is pregnant with mischief and gives birth to lies.
zh: 看哪！惡人為了罪孽經歷產痛， 他懷的是惡毒，生下的是虛謊。

en: He makes a pit, digging it out, and falls into the hole that he has made.
zh: 他挖掘坑穴，挖得深深的， 自己卻掉進所挖的陷阱裡。

en: His mischief returns upon his own head, and on his own skull his violence descends.
zh: 他的惡毒必回到自己的頭上， 他的強暴必落在自己的頭頂上。

en: I will give to the LORD the thanks due to his righteousness, and I will sing praise to the name of the LORD, the Most High.
zh: 我要照著耶和華的公義稱謝他， 歌頌至高者耶和華的名。
